recommendations.title: Buried Alive
recommendations.overview: A college prank at an abandoned house accidentally awakens a frightening spirit.

A contemporary, ensemble drama that tells the complex tale of six high school students whose lives are interwoven with situations that so many of today's youth are faced with. The story takes place during a normal school day. At precisely 2:37 a trag

recommendations.title: Don't Hang Up
recommendations.overview: An evening of drunken prank calls becomes a nightmare for a pair of teenagers when a mysterious stranger turns their own game against them.

recommendations.title: Slaughter High
recommendations.overview: Eight different people are invited to their 10-year high school reunion at their now-closed down high school where a former student, disfigured from a prank gone wrong, is there to seek revenge.
recommendations.director: Mark Ezra, George Dugdale, Peter Mackenzie Litten

recommendations.title: House of the Witch
recommendations.overview: A group of high-school kids set out to play a Halloween prank at an abandoned house, but once they enter they become victims of a demonic witch who has set her wrath upon them.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.

recommendations.title: Money
recommendations.overview: Two wealthy businessmen are about to get away with $5 million in ill-gotten money until their plans are revealed by an uninvited house guest.

recommendations.title: Surveillance
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent tracks a serial killer with the help of three of his would-be victims - all of whom have wildly different stories to tell.

recommendations.title: Bring It On: Cheer Or Die
recommendations.overview: When a cheer squad practices their routines on Halloween weekend in an abandoned school, they are picked off one by one by an unknown killer.

recommendations.title: Satanic Panic
recommendations.overview: A pizza delivery girl is suddenly in for the fight of her young life when encountering a group of Satanists in need of a virgin to ritually sacrifice.
